snippet.title: Rouge Fusion by Ahuja
snippet.description:
@Ahuja Fragrances, I have never been a fan of Baccarat Rouge 540 or the hype it and all of its dupes receive. That is, until I smelled Rouge Fusion by Ahuja. This inspiration amps up the citrus and vanilla in a way to pull whatever it was in the 540 DNA that I found off-putting, and has now made it a must-have for me. And just like with all of this brand’s fragrances? It has insane longevity for my skin and pH.
#rougefusion #br540 #ahujacontest #perfumetiktok #perfumes

localized.title: Rouge Fusion by Ahuja
localized.description:
@Ahuja Fragrances, I have never been a fan of Baccarat Rouge 540 or the hype it and all of its dupes receive. That is, until I smelled Rouge Fusion by Ahuja. This inspiration amps up the citrus and vanilla in a way to pull whatever it was in the 540 DNA that I found off-putting, and has now made it a must-have for me. And just like with all of this brand’s fragrances? It has insane longevity for my skin and pH.
#rougefusion #br540 #ahujacontest #perfumetiktok #perfumes
